hero.title: Scholarly Research Perfected.
hero.subtitle: Elite academic support for researchers who demand precision, integrity, and international publishing standards.

firmSummary.title: R&D Services: A Global Research Legacy
firmSummary.description: R & D Services Pvt. Ltd. is a premier academic consulting firm dedicated to bridging the gap between innovative research and high-impact publishing. We don't just draft papers; we cultivate scholarly legacies through a systematic, methodology-first approach that ensures rigorous adherence to international standards.

services.title: Research Papers
services.description: Well-researched, structured academic papers with proper citations and references, adhering to international scholarly standards.

services.title: Thesis Writing
services.description: Comprehensive guidance and drafting support for undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD theses across various disciplines.

services.title: Dissertation
services.description: Specialized support for long-form academic research projects, focusing on methodology, data analysis, and synthesis.

services.title: Project Reports (New)
services.description: Detailed technical and academic reports for institutional projects, internships, and corporate research initiatives.

services.title: Literature Review (New)
services.description: Exhaustive synthesis of existing scholarly work to identify research gaps and build a theoretical framework.

services.title: Research Proposal (New)
services.description: Strategic drafting of research blueprints for ethical clearance, funding applications, and academic admissions.

pricing.name: Basic
pricing.description: Essential support for standard academic reports and research projects.

pricing.name: Professional
pricing.description: Comprehensive support for advanced research articles and dissertations.

pricing.name: Premium
pricing.description: Elite end-to-end guidance for high-impact thesis and global publishing.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.content: The level of academic rigor and methodological precision provided by R&D Services is unparalleled. My thesis was delivered ahead of schedule with flawless citations.

testimonials.name: Dr. Rahul Verma
testimonials.content: Collaborating with Om Prakash Sinha's team was a turning point for my research paper. Their insights into journal-specific requirements were instrumental in my acceptance.

testimonials.name: Preeti Sahani
testimonials.content: The technical documentation and literature synthesis were exceptionally deep. They don't just write; they understand the core scientific contribution of your work.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the work is plagiarism-free?
faqs.answer: We use advanced plagiarism detection tools (like Turnitin) and provide a free plagiarism report with every project.

faqs.question: What is your typical turnaround time?
faqs.answer: Delivery times depend on project complexity. A standard paper takes 3-5 days, while a thesis takes 2-4 weeks.
